1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Kontaktinfo | Usbl

https://www.usbl.no/om-oss/kontakt

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a href="https://www.anskaffelser.no/verktoy/mottakere-i-elma" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">ELMA-registeret.</a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Link opens in new window without indication

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Redusert krav til egenkapital - slik påvirkes boligmarkedet - Usbl

https://www.usbl.no/inspirasjon-og-tips/eiendom-og-okonomi/hvordan-pavirker-nye-krav-til-egenkapital-boligmarkedet-for-deg-og-meg

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class="menu__close-button-text">Lukk</span><svg class="icon menu__close-button-icon" focusable="false" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['span']

<ol><li class="breadcrumb-link" itemprop="itemListElement" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/ListItem"><a href="/inspirasjon-og-tips" itemprop="item"><span class="breadcrumb-link__span" itempr
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="inspo-promo-block__link" href="/inspirasjon-og-tips/eiendom-og-okonomi/akkvisisjon-anskaffelse-av-tomter-til-boligutvikling"><span class="inspo-promo-block__link-span">Les mer</span></a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="social-media-link" href="https://facebook.com/boligbyggelaget.usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focusa
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Instagram" class="social-media-link" href="https://instagram.com/boligbyggelaget_usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focu
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="LinkedIn" class="social-media-link" href="https://linkedin.com/company/usbl" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focusable="fals
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class="menu__close-button-text">Lukk</span><svg class="icon menu__close-button-icon" focusable="false" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Bonabo'

<a href="/om-oss/bonabo">Gå til Bonabo</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (183 characters)

<a href="/medlemskap/slik-far-du-bonus">For å samle bonus ved kjøp av varer og tjenester hos våre samarbeidspartnere, må ditt betalingskort være lagt inn på Min side. Da samler du automatisk bonus når
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="http://www.kartverket.no/">www.kartverket.no</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="/medlemskap/ditt-medlemskap/overfor-medlemskap">https://www.usbl.no/medlemskap/ditt-medlemskap/overfor-medlemskap</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="social-media-link" href="https://facebook.com/boligbyggelaget.usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focusa
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Instagram" class="social-media-link" href="https://instagram.com/boligbyggelaget_usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focu
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="LinkedIn" class="social-media-link" href="https://linkedin.com/company/usbl" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focusable="fals

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class="menu__close-button-text">Lukk</span><svg class="icon menu__close-button-icon" focusable="false" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['span']

<ol><li class="breadcrumb-link" itemprop="itemListElement" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/ListItem"><a href="/inspirasjon-og-tips" itemprop="item"><span class="breadcrumb-link__span" itempr
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="inspo-promo-block__link" href="/styret/kundefordeler"><span class="inspo-promo-block__link-span">Les mer </span></a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/wUIm1OFARvY?si=LSYlK9LRGPe8raDw?rel=0&amp;modestbrandi
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://fulltegningsforsikring.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Fulltegningsforsikring fra NBBL Fulltegningsforsikring AS</a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

<a class="promo-block promo-block--left promo-block--beige" href="/inspirasjon-og-tips/eiendom-og-okonomi/oppstart-av-sameie-med-usbl-som-forretningsforer"><div class="promo-block__content"><h2 class=

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class="menu__close-button-text">Lukk</span><svg class="icon menu__close-button-icon" focusable="false" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['span']

<ol><li class="breadcrumb-link" itemprop="itemListElement" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/ListItem"><a href="/inspirasjon-og-tips" itemprop="item"><span class="breadcrumb-link__span" itempr
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="http://www.mariannenoren.com/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none" xml:lang="NB-NO"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">www.mariannenoren.com</span></span></
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.mariannenoren.com/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none" xml:lang="NB-NO"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">www.mariannenoren.com</span></span></
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Klikk her'

<a class="inspo-promo-block__link" href="https://www.usbl.no/medlemskap/medlemsfordeler"><span class="inspo-promo-block__link-span">Klikk her</span></a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

https://www.usbl.no/medlemskap/ditt-medlemskap

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/medlemskap/ta-i-bruk-medlemsappen"><img alt="" height="200" src="/usbl_presserom.jpg?pid=Native-ContentFile-File&r_n_d=1741268686801&adjust=1&x=200&y=200&=%2c" width="200
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="heading heading--h3-portal contact-card__title"> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="button button_alignment--full-width button_theme--light-primary" href="/om-oss/var-barekraftstrategi" target="" title="" type="" value=""><span class="button__text">Les mer</span></a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:aapenhetsloven@usbl.no" rel="noopener" target="_blank">aapenhetsloven@usbl.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--font-theme-uppercase-condensed link--has-icon" href="/usbl-redegjorelse-om-vare-aktsomhetsvurderinger-for-2024.pdf" rel="nofollow noopener

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.bonord.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Bonord</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="social-media-link" href="https://facebook.com/boligbyggelaget.usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focusa
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Instagram" class="social-media-link" href="https://instagram.com/boligbyggelaget_usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focu

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Inspirasjon og tips | Usbl.no

https://www.usbl.no/inspirasjon-og-tips

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focusable="false" height="50" viewbox="0 0 50 50" width="50" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g fill="none" fill-rule="evenodd"><circle cx="25" cy="25" r="
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="icon social-media-link__icon" focusable="false" height="50" viewbox="0 0 50 50" width="50" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g fill="none" fill-rule="evenodd"><circle cx="25" cy="25" r="
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'inspofilter' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" id="radio-inspofilter-" name="inspofilter" type="radio" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class="menu__close-button-text">Lukk</span><svg class="icon menu__close-button-icon" focusable="false" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (164 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Link opens in new window without indication

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="link link--animation-shrink link--color-yellow link--font-theme-regular" href="mailto:"><div class="link__text-wrapper"><span class="link__text"></span></div></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="heading"><button aria-expanded="false" class="menu-group__button"><div class="menu-group__arrow"></div>Våre tjenester</button></h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link menu-group__link link--animation-expand link--color-black link--theme-menu link--has-icon" href="https://forkjop.bbl.no/usbl/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=Model.LayoutViewModel.MetadataViewModel.GtmId" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"><div style="height:0;overflow:hidden;visibility:hidden"><div class="menu"><nav class="menu__container"><button class="menu__close-button"><span class
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://usbl.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://usbl.no --max-pages 18 --format html
